workflow.name: Puber Bugfix Investigation
workflow.description: Reproduce, diagnose, fix, verify, and conservatively clean up a Puber Android bugfix.

transition_groups.description: Start bug reproduction and diagnosis from the task body.
Diagnosis is ready; user approval required before code changes.
Diagnosis is intentionally report-only; run conservative cleanup.
Diagnosis is blocked by missing reproduction details, credentials, device access, or source context.
Fix was implemented and needs independent verification.
Fixing is blocked by missing input, unsafe state, or verification failure.
Verification found remaining issues; user approval required before another fix pass.
Bugfix verification passed; run conservative cleanup.
Verification is blocked by missing device, credentials, or failing external dependencies.
Cleanup report is ready; finish the task.

edges.prompt_template:
Run Puber bug reproduction and diagnosis for this Kent task.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Treat the task title/body as the bug report. Create an explicit .todo/bugfix-<name> workspace; do not infer or create .todo/.current. Reproduce when possible, inspect relevant code, identify likely root cause, and write a concise diagnosis artifact in the workspace. Do not edit production code in this node.

Complete with fix when the root cause and fix plan are clear and provide workspace_path, diagnosis_report, reproduction_steps, and candidate_files. Complete with done if this is intentionally report-only and no code change should be made. Complete with blocked if reproduction or diagnosis is blocked and provide blocker_reason.

Implement the approved Puber bugfix.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Use workspace {{.Params.workspace_path}} and diagnosis {{.Params.diagnosis_report}}. Apply the smallest robust fix, preserve project architecture, and verify with the narrowest relevant Gradle/test command. Use ./tools/agentw in .kent/worktrees and ./gradlew in the main checkout.

Complete with verify and provide workspace_path, diagnosis_report, reproduction_steps, changed_files, and verification_summary. Complete with blocked if unsafe or missing input and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Path to the explicit .todo/bugfix-* workspace created during diagnosis.
Root cause analysis, suspected files, and fix plan.
Steps used to reproduce or prove the bug.
Files likely involved in the bug and proposed fix.

edges.prompt_template: Run conservative Puber task cleanup after report-only diagnosis. Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: Why diagnosis cannot continue, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template:
Verify the Puber bugfix read-only.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Compare the implementation against {{.Params.diagnosis_report}}, reproduce or reason through {{.Params.reproduction_steps}} when available from prior context, and run focused verification if practical. Do not edit files in this node.

Complete with done if accepted. Complete with needs_changes if the fix is incomplete and provide workspace_path, verification_report, and changed_files. Complete with blocked if verification cannot complete and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Root cause analysis and fix plan used for implementation.
Steps used to reproduce or prove the bug, or not available if the bug could not be reproduced.
Commands run by the fixer and their pass/fail results.
Why fixing cannot continue, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template: Fix the remaining Puber bugfix verification findings. Apply only the changes requested in {{.Params.verification_report}}, verify narrowly, and complete with verify or blocked.

parameters.description: Verification findings and remaining issues to fix.
Files changed by the bugfix so far.

edges.prompt_template: Run conservative Puber task cleanup. Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: Why verification cannot complete, in the task language when practical.
Summary of cleanup performed or deliberately skipped.
